/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdistance_warning__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdistance_warning__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/distance_warning__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/distance_warning/srv/detail/set_threshold__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/distance_warning__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/distance_warning/action/detail/check_distance__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
